name: ai.shumi/mcp
description: Crypto trade-intelligence: prices, trends, funding rates, sentiment, narratives, market regime, signals, and delta-neutral ideas.

environmentVariables.name: SHUMI_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Shumi API key (shumi_sk_*). Create one at https://shumi.ai.

environmentVariables.name: SHUMI_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override the API base URL (defaults to the production coinrotator-ai endpoint).
